# sitecoreauthoring_item (Data Source)

Use this data source to get information about a Sitecore item by ID or path from the Authoring API.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `existing_version_only` (Boolean) If true, only returns items that have an existing version. If not specified, returns items regardless of version status.
- `field_names` (Set of String) Set of field names to retrieve for the item and its children. If not specified, no fields will be retrieved.
- `item_id` (String) The ID of the item to retrieve. Either item_id or path must be specified.
- `path` (String) The path of the item to retrieve. Either item_id or path must be specified.
- `required` (Boolean) If true, the data source will fail if the item doesn't exist. If false or not specified, the data source will return null values if the item doesn't exist.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Placeholder identifier attribute.
- `item` (Attributes) The retrieved item. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--item))

<a id="nestedatt--item"></a>
### Nested Schema for `item`

Read-Only:

- `display_name` (String) The display name of the item.
- `fields` (Map of String) The fields of the item.
- `item_id` (String) The ID of the item.
- `name` (String) The name of the item.
- `path` (String) The path of the item.
- `template_id` (String) The template ID of the item.
- `template_name` (String) The template name of the item.
